populations.name: ITT (Intent-to-Treat)
populations.criteria: All subjects who were randomized to treatment

populations.name: Safety
populations.definition: All subjects who received at least one dose
populations.criteria: Received at least 1 dose of study drug

populations.name: Efficacy
populations.definition: All subjects with post-baseline efficacy assessment
populations.criteria: At least one post-baseline efficacy assessment
